b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Optimization Strategies"}]
c:["$","h3",null,{"children":"1. Batch Writes"}]
d:["$","$L24",null,{"code":"# Bad: Individual writes\nfor item in items:\n  mem.remember(item)\n\n# Good: Batch transaction\nwith mem.transaction():\n  for item in items:\n      mem.remember(item)\n","language":"python"}]
e:["$","h3",null,{"children":"2. Connection Pooling"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-threaded applications:"}]
10:["$","$L24",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(pool_size=10)\n","language":"python"}]
11:["$","h3",null,{"children":"3. Embedding Caching"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Cache embeddings to avoid redundant API calls:"}]
13:["$","$L24",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(embedding_cache_size=10000)\n","language":"python"}]
14:["$","h3",null,{"children":"4. Index Tuning"}]
15:["$","$L24",null,{"code":"# Rebuild indices after bulk load\nmem.rebuild_indices()\n\n# Analyze query patterns\nmem.analyze_queries()\n\n# Vacuum database\nmem.vacuum()\n","language":"python"}]
16:["$","h3",null,{"children":"5. Working Memory Limits"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"Keep Working Memory lean:"}]
18:["$","$L24",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(\n  max_working=500,  # Lower = faster eviction, faster queries\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # More frequent consolidation\n)\n","language":"python"}]
19:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Profiling"}]
1a:["$","$L24",null,{"code":"# Enable query logging\nmem = Memory(profile_queries=True)\n\n# Get slow queries\nslow = mem.slow_queries(min_latency_ms=100)\nfor q in slow:\n  print(f\"{q.latency_ms}ms: {q.query}\")\n","language":"python"}]
1b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Memory Usage"}]
